message.content:
@startuml
actor "loggedInOrgAdmin" as User1
participant frontend
controller UserController
service UserService
database AclUpdateHelper

User1 ->> frontend : add coach role for myself\naddCoachRoleToOrgAdmin(org_id)
frontend->UserController:addCoachRoleToLoggedInUser(org_id)\n(Check user is org admin)
UserService-->AclUpdateHelper: add acl permission to user


@enduml
